full_text:
Shentu Pan (Zilong) 申屠蟠 (子龍)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shentu Pan (申屠蟠), styledZilong (子龍). Refused appointment and when Dong Zhuo tried to hire him, laughed at the idea. Shentu Pan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Shentu Pan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
